subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Which famous fort was built by Raja Man Singh I?
question_hi: राजा मनसिंग आई के बनने वाले गतिविद्यार्थी क्या थे।
explanation_en: Amer Fort, also known as Amer Fort or Amer Kundala, is a historical fort and palace complex in Jaipur, Rajasthan, India. Raja Man Singh I was one of the prime movers of the Mughal-Rajput Alliance. Kumbhalgarh Fort, Mehrangarh Fort, and Jaigarh Fort are also renowned forts in Rajasthan, but Amer Fort was constructed during the reign of Raja Man Singh I and is therefore the correct answer.
explanation_hi: आमे कंधार, राजमन सिंग एल एन सदर में आएंगे ने आमे कंधार का निर्माण करें, जो राजमन सिंग एल एन के सदर में आएंगे नहरी का निर्माण है।
explanation_en: Amer Fort, also known as Amer Fort or Amer Nagar, was built by Raja Man Singh I in Jaipur. Amer Fort is a historical monument in Jaipur, Rajasthan, built by Raja Man Singh I during the Mughal-Rajput alliance.
explanation_hi: आमे का निर्माण करेंगे राजमन सिंग एल एन के सदर में आएंगे नहरी का निर्माण है।
explanation_en: Amer Fort, also known as Amer Fort or Amer Nagar, was built by Raja Man Singh I in Jaipur. Amer Fort is a historical monument in Jaipur, Rajasthan, built by Raja Man Singh I during the Mughal-Rajput alliance.
explanation_hi: आमे का निर्माण करेंगे राजमेंग सिंग एल एन के सदर में आएंगे नहरी का निर्माण है।
